prerequisites: A Huntr for Organizations account. The Huntr API is the Organization API, intended for organizations that track the job search progress of their members. It does not work for cases where individual job seekers have only personally shared their boards with you.
Access to your organization's Huntr admin dashboard, where Access Tokens are registered.
An Access Token, used as the connector's `api_key`. Keep it secret.

authMethods.name: API Key (Access Token)
authMethods.summary: Huntr authenticates with an organization Access Token. The connector's `api_key` secret field holds this token, which Huntr sends as an HTTP bearer credential in the form `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Keep the token secret.

setupSteps.title: Confirm you have a Huntr for Organizations account
setupSteps.body: The Huntr API is the Organization API and requires an organizational Huntr account that tracks the job search progress of its members. It is not for personally shared individual boards.

setupSteps.title: Register an Access Token in the admin dashboard
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your organization's Huntr admin dashboard and register an Access Token. This token is what the connector uses to authenticate. Keep it secret.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token as the connector api_key
setupSteps.body: Enter the Access Token into the connector's required `api_key` field. The connector sends it to the Huntr Organization API as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on each request.
